module_info.docstring:
Fetch a YouTube video transcript and output it as structured JSON.

Usage:
    python fetch_transcript.py <url_or_video_id> [--language en,tr] [--timestamps]

Output (JSON):
    {
        "video_id": "...",
        "language": "en",
        "segments": [{"text": "...", "start": 0.0, "duration": 2.5}, ...],
        "full_text": "complete transcript as plain text",
        "timestamped_text": "00:00 first line
00:05 second line
..."
    }

Install dependency:  pip install youtube-transcript-api

functions.name: extract_video_id
functions.docstring: Extract the 11-character video ID from various YouTube URL formats.

functions.name: format_timestamp
functions.docstring: Convert seconds to HH:MM:SS or MM:SS format.
